SiteContent.title: SiteContent
SiteContent.description: Represents the editable content of the Dentora homepage including all sections, headings, images, and collections of items.

hero.description: Content of the dental clinic hero presentation slide

about.description: Details about the clinic, editorial statements, and statistics

services.description: List of editable services including pricing tags, descriptions, and pictures

whyChooseUs.description: Key benefits and side images of the clinic

testimonials.description: Patient review cards, ratings, and avatar profile photos

faqs.description: Editable list of frequently asked questions and answers

finalCta.description: The closing highlight CTA banner contents

footer.description: Footer metadata, contact phone, email and hours

AdminConfig.title: AdminConfig
AdminConfig.description: Tracks users with administrative permissions who can modify the web application

/site_content/{documentId}.description: Collection storing the single site presentation document synced across all devices

/admins/{adminUid}.description: Determines which authenticated users have admin rights
